scope: Read-only final reconstruction of the Prize Pack backlog after V22 nonblocked evidence exhaustion.

ACQUISITION_BLOCKED.definition: Row depends on official-source confirmation not currently available in the validated local source pack.

NONBLOCKED_NO_HIT.definition: Route is valid, accessible evidence was searched, and no exact or near corroborated series hit was found.

rows.final_bucket_reason: Accessible Series 1-8 sources produced no exact hit and no usable near-hit evidence for this printed identity.

NONBLOCKED_NEAR_HIT_ONLY.definition: Accessible evidence contains only near hits such as wrong number, wrong set token, or otherwise non-exact identity evidence.

rows.final_bucket_reason: Accessible sources showed name-level or set-family signal only; no exact name + printed-number identity match was found.

SPECIAL_CASE_UNRESOLVED.definition: Remaining nonblocked row with special-family history or special-case handling that still lacks exact Prize Pack evidence.

rows.final_bucket_reason: Special-family repair proved a lawful base owner but no exact Prize Pack series evidence; keep unresolved without promotion.

ERROR_SOURCE_DUPLICATE.definition: Duplicate/error source row that should not be treated as an independent unresolved canon candidate.

rows.final_bucket_reason: Source row is labelled as an error/duplicate and has a same name-number-set companion row; keep out of canon execution.

recommended_future_paths.allowed_when: A new official or first-party distributed checklist/source appears that can supply exact printed-identity evidence for unresolved rows.
recommended_future_paths.action: Import as local JSON or equivalent source-backed artifact, then rerun a bounded evidence-upgrade pass only for rows affected by that source.

recommended_future_paths.allowed_when: A genuinely new accessible authoritative source appears with exact name + set/number evidence, not a community-maintained transcription.
recommended_future_paths.action: Open one bounded evidence slice and preserve the same READY / DO_NOT_CANON / WAIT classification rules.

recommended_future_paths.allowed_when: No stronger evidence exists than the current local official pack, Series 3-8 fixtures, and reachable Bulbapedia pages.
recommended_future_paths.action: Leave unresolved rows frozen in their final buckets; do not promote, map, image-close, or mutate canon from no-hit or near-hit evidence.

recommended_future_paths.allowed_when: Duplicate/error source rows need explicit source-staging cleanup so they are not mistaken for independent canon candidates.
recommended_future_paths.action: Review source staging only; this is not a canon mutation or Prize Pack promotion path.

checkpoint_index_alignment.note: Repository scan found no warehouse checkpoint index or TODO ledger requiring append-only alignment.
